items.title: [Highlight] Yuki Kawamura hits the step back 3 over Dante Maddox Jr. to get the crowd buzzing (with a replay). Jay Huff is doing a sort of an air guitar celebration
items.author: MrBuckBuck

items.title: Johnny Furphy is here for Pacers-76ers. Don't remember seeing him yesterday. Obi Toppin, Jay Huff, and Ben Sheppard as well.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Johnny Furphy is here for Pacers-76ers. Don't remember seeing him yesterday. Obi Toppin, Jay Huff, and Ben Sheppard as well.

items.title: Something I was thinking about when Team USA kept trying to switch w/ Jay Huff:
items.author: Caitlin Cooper
items.body_excerpt:
Something I was thinking about when Team USA kept trying to switch w/ Jay Huff: 

The NBA averaged the most possessions w/ at least 3 offensive players crashing last season in the tracking era. Are switching bigs as valuable the more teams value possession maxxing?

items.title: Ex-Pacer Torrey Craig with a go-ahead 3 late, then Jay Huff with the game-sealing block for Team USA. They survive and beat the Dominican Republic 82-81.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Ex-Pacer Torrey Craig with a go-ahead 3 late, then Jay Huff with the game-sealing block for Team USA. They survive and beat the Dominican Republic 82-81.

"James" Huff, as the broadcast said, finishes with 12 points, 3 rebounds, and 3 blocks.

items.title: And here's Jay Huff's first basket for Team USA in this cycle. Yes, they have been calling him "James" the entire broadcast so far.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: And here's Jay Huff's first basket for Team USA in this cycle. Yes, they have been calling him "James" the entire broadcast so far.

items.title: Pacers notebook: Kelly Oubre Jr. addition, Summer League roster set, and Jay Huff joins Team USA
items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: Good evening and welcome back to Fieldhouse Files. We’re just two days into NBA free agency, and it’s been slower than normal — while still featuring several splash moves. Nothing was more surprising than the Celtics moving Jaylen Brown to the 76ers on the first full day of free…

items.title: Jay Huff suiting up for Team USA in World Cup qualifiers next month. Also, ex Pacers/adjacent Pedro Bradshaw, Terry Taylor, Gabe York, and Jarrod Uthoff.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Jay Huff suiting up for Team USA in World Cup qualifiers next month. Also, ex Pacers/adjacent Pedro Bradshaw, Terry Taylor, Gabe York, and Jarrod Uthoff.

items.title: Pacers center Jay Huff has been named to the USA World Cup Qualifying Team for next month.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers center Jay Huff has been named to the USA World Cup Qualifying Team for next month.

It also includes several former Pacers/Boom: Terry Taylor, Pedro Bradshaw, Jarrod Uthoff, Gabe York.
